name: Orange Shortbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour a 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Beat butter and the sugar with an electric mixer until creamy.
3. Add orange peel to the mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Mix in flour and cornstarch until fully incorporated.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan and chill for 30 minutes.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Score the chilled dough into 1-1/2 by 3-inch bars using a sharp knife.
8. Sprinkle each bar with an additional tablespoon of sugar.
9. Bake for 50 minutes or until golden brown, then let cool in the pan on a rack.
This recipe yields approximately 18 bars, each weighing about 131 calories, containing 1 gram of protein, 15 grams of carbohydrates, 8 grams of fat, and 21 milligrams of cholesterol with butter, 0 milligrams of cholesterol with margarine. Each bar also contains 78 milligrams of sodium and provides exchanges of 1/2 starch/bread, 1/4 fruit, and 1-1/2 fat.
